title: AZ-305 Microsoft Azure Architect Design Prerequisites
summary: Learn the basic Azure concepts you'll need to know as an Azure infrastructure architect. This path gives you the knowledge to be successful as you begin studying for AZ-305: Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions.

sections.title: AZ-305 Microsoft Azure Architect Design Prerequisites
sections.summary: Learn the basic Azure concepts you'll need to know as an Azure infrastructure architect. This path gives you the knowledge to be successful as you begin studying for AZ-305: Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions.

lessons.title: Describe the core architectural components of Azure
lessons.content_md:
Describe the core architectural components of Azure

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-core-architectural-components-of-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Describe the core architectural components of Azure

lessons.title: Describe Azure compute services
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to Azure compute services (virtual machines, containers, Azure Functions), application hosting options, and AI/ML and IoT/Edge service categories.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-azure-compute-networking-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe Azure storage services
lessons.content_md:
Azure storage services, tiers, redundancy options, and migration options and tools.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-azure-storage-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security
lessons.content_md:
Describe Azure identity, access, and security

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-azure-identity-access-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

lessons.title: Introduction to the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the basics of how to use the Cloud Adoption Framework to help you align your strategy for business, people, and technology.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/cloud-adoption-framework/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework

lessons.title: Introduction to the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework
lessons.content_md:
Learn how using key principles throughout your cloud architecture can help you design and build a solid architectural foundation that you can continuously improve.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-introduction/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AZ-305 Microsoft Azure Architect Design Prerequisites
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AZ-305 Microsoft Azure Architect Design Prerequisites**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
